lean_stdlib_notes.no_by_contra: by_contra is 'unknown tactic' in Lean 4.28.0 - use Nat.le_of_not_lt instead
lean_stdlib_notes.no_push_neg: push_neg not available without Mathlib - use Nat.not_le.mp or omega
lean_stdlib_notes.no_split_ifs: split_ifs not available without Mathlib - use by_cases h : cond
lean_stdlib_notes.no_nat_le_or_lt: Nat.le_or_lt does NOT exist in Lean 4.28-4.29 - use 'by_cases h : a <= b' instead
lean_stdlib_notes.omega_cant_min: omega cannot reason about Nat.min directly - use by_cases with Nat.min_eq_left/Nat.min_eq_right then rw
lean_stdlib_notes.nat_min_pattern: For min proofs: by_cases h : a <= b; rw [Nat.min_eq_left h]; else rw [Nat.min_eq_right (Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.not_le.mp h))]
lean_stdlib_notes.nat_max_le_mpr: Nat.max_le.mpr <h1, h2> proves max a b <= k from h1 : a <= k and h2 : b <= k
lean_stdlib_notes.nat_le_max_left: Nat.le_max_left a b : a <= max a b
lean_stdlib_notes.nat_max_eq_left: Nat.max_eq_left (h : b <= a) : max a b = a
lean_stdlib_notes.nat_max_eq_right: Nat.max_eq_right (h : a <= b) : max a b = b
lean_stdlib_notes.nat_min_le_left: Nat.min_le_left a b : min a b <= a
lean_stdlib_notes.nat_min_le_right: Nat.min_le_right a b : min a b <= b
lean_stdlib_notes.nat_not_le_mp: Nat.not_le.mp h where h : NOT(a <= b) gives b < a
lean_stdlib_notes.nat_le_of_lt: Nat.le_of_lt h where h : a < b gives a <= b
lean_stdlib_notes.unused_simp_args: Lean 4.29 linter warns on unused simp args - do not pass hm after 'cases hm :' in <;> simp
lean_stdlib_notes.barrel_file: formal-verification/lean/FVSquad.lean must import ALL module files for lake build to compile them
lean_stdlib_notes.import_placement: imports MUST be at the very top of the file, before any doc comments or code
lean_stdlib_notes.theorem_ordering: Define theorems BEFORE use - cannot forward-reference.

aeneas_status: BLOCKED - no-new-privileges container prevents opam/sudo install. Charon.toml exists in repo.
ci_status: HEALTHY - lean-ci.yml present and updated run106. Cache key now includes lean-toolchain version. Added sorry source check step.

critique_notes.main_semantic_gap: Voter lists use List Nat instead of deduplicated Finset/HashSet - theorems hold under implicit Nodup assumption not formally enforced
critique_notes.empty_outgoing_divergence: jointCommittedIndex empty-config returns 0 in Lean model vs u64::MAX in Rust - documented in JCI9+JCI10 and CORRESPONDENCE.md
